solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use AST analysis to check that useStore calls have >= 3 arguments. test_not_tautological.reason: A stub or no-op implementation would not pass the f2p tests. The tests verify that useStore calls have exactly 3 arguments in the actual source files. Without modifying the source to add comparator arguments, the existing 2-argument calls would cause assertion failures (e.g., data['with_comparator'] == data['total'] would fail).
